'''Gormdin''' was a [[Moon/Legends|moon]] in the [[Sarrelon system/Legends|Sarrelon system]], covered in dense [[Forest/Legends|forests]], steep plateaus, and rolling plains.

==Description==
Gormdin was a [[Temperature/Legends|temperate]], terrestrial [[Moon/Legends|moon]] in [[Orbit/Legends|orbit]] around the [[Gas giant/Legends|gas giant]] [[Sarrelon IV]] in the [[Sarrelon system/Legends|Sarrelon system]],<ref name="WBC" /> located in the [[Brevost sector/Legends|Brevost sector]] of the [[Expansion Region/Legends|Expansion Region]] of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]]<ref name="EAOC" /> and within the region known as the [[Trailing Sectors/Legends|Trailing Sectors]].<ref name="TEA" /> Gormdin was the only habitable world in the Sarrelon system, possessing a breathable [[Atmosphere/Legends|atmosphere]] and standard gravity. Four [[Ocean/Legends|oceans]] occupied 60% of the moon's surface and its land masses were covered by plains, plateaus, and forests composed of [[Tree/Legends|trees]] ranging from 1.5 to 2 [[Meter/Legends|meters]] tall. Small forested areas on the plateaus supported the [[Gorm (species)|Gorms]], a [[Sentience/Legends|sentient]] [[Species/Legends|species]] native to the world. There was no planet-wide system of government on Gorm; the moon's several [[City/Legends|cities]] conducted trade, but each maintained its own laws and government.<ref name="WBC" />

==History==
In the early [[Standard year/Legends|years]] of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]], [[Lohn Genden]] and his band of [[Terrorist/Legends|terrorists]] were based in a network of [[Cave/Legends|caves]] beneath one of Gormdin's plateaus.<ref name="WBC" />
